nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 褐鵜鶘
nodes.summary: 褐鵜鶘（Brown pelican，学名 Pelecanus occidentalis），分类上属于鹈形目，并归入鹈鹕科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联9个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括沼泽，主要威胁包括农药污染。

nodes.name: 鹈形目

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The brown pelican (Pelecanus occidentalis) is a bird of the pelican family, Pelecanidae, one of three species found in the Americas and one of two that feed by diving into water

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The brown pelican (Pelecanus occidentalis) is a bird of the pelican family, Pelecanidae, one of three species found in the Americas and one of two that feed by diving into water

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: state)|Georgia]], the West Indies, and many Caribbean islands as far south as Guyana. Along the Gulf Coast, it inhabits Alabama, Texas, Florida, Mississippi, Louisiana, and Mexico. The brown pelican is a strictly marine species, primarily inhabiting marine subtidal, warm estuarine, and marine pelagic waters. It is also found in mangrove swamps, and prefers shallow waters, especially near salty bays and beaches. It avoids the open sea, seldom venturing more than 20 miles from the coast. Some immature birds may stray to inland freshwater lakes
